meaning: n.<粗>鼻涕,<俚>蛮横无礼的人,卑鄙下贱的人
examples: Before that, he had been researching the antibiotic properties of his own snot.
When's the last time you actually saw a mother in a designer suit that wasn't stained with spit or snot?
My first memory is of awakening in a makeshift bed, dried snot caked in my nose and mouth, under a blanket of reeds.
When Valerie was done, the thing was covered in elephant snot, but it worked.
The balance of my IRA has had the snot beat out of it.
